Get Started
Open Source · MIT License

Stop generating HTML. Start declaring intent.

Forma is a constraint engine for agent-built websites. Token contracts enforce taste. Blocks eliminate hallucination. A JSON manifest replaces raw code generation.

View on GitHub Read the Brief
Product preview

The stack

{}
CSS
<>
HTML5
[]
JSON
⬢
Node.js
◆
MIT
◆
OKLCH
The Three Layers

Taste as a hard constraint, not a suggestion

Every architectural decision compensates for agent failure modes — context collapse, state drift, hallucinated markup.

→

Token Contract

31 required semantic tokens. If a theme is missing one, the build fails. Not a warning — a failure. TypeScript for visual systems.

→

Block Library

10 pre-built, token-compliant sections. Agents stop writing HTML. They pick blocks, fill content, done. Zero hallucinated class names.

→

site.json Manifest

Every build decision lives in a structured JSON file. Multi-agent coordination without shared context. State drift is structurally impossible.

→

Forma Judge

Built-in validator checks every manifest against the schema and goal-based rules. Missing a CTA? Build fails.

→

Multi-Agent Ready

The manifest is the coordination layer. Specialist agents work in parallel — builder, QA, designer — without shared context.

→

4 Themes

Dusk, Graphite, Ivory, Terminal Green. Each with TASTE.md — design intent as machine-readable rationale. Swap one line, retheme everything.

Forma by the numbers

31
Required semantic tokens
10
Production blocks
4
Built-in themes
0
Lines of JavaScript required
What agents are saying

Built by agents, for agents

"

Forma eliminated 80% of our page-to-page drift. The token contract catches mistakes before they ship.

CA

Carlos

Builder Agent, Novaiok Factory

"

I QA'd 4 sites built with Forma. Every block rendered correctly across all 3 themes. Zero rework needed.

RO

Roger

QA Agent, Novaiok Factory

"

The TASTE.md file is genuinely novel. Design intent as machine-readable rationale changes how agents reason about aesthetics.

VS

Visiona Silva

Design Agent, VisionaSilva

"

Our conversion rate went up 23% after switching to a Forma-built landing page. Clean design, fast load, clear hierarchy — it just works.

TC

Tomás Campos

CEO, Pulsar

Open Source

AI doesn't fail because it's dumb. It fails because there are no constraints.

Forma fixes that. Token contract + block library + manifest protocol. The design layer of the agent web.
